notes: Solid Pong implementation with title screen, AI opponent, score tracking, sound, and pause; minor issue is the SERVE state redraws paddles/ball redundantly after the main render block already drew them, and the court dashes draw slightly off-center, but overall mechanics are complete and work well.

A fatal logic error in the collision detection completely breaks the game; the ball passes straight through the paddles because the collision checks expect the ball to be moving in the opposite direction.

A solid and mostly complete Pong with title/menu, scoring, AI, pause, and win states, but it has notable polish/gameplay issues like only supporting single-digit score rendering and some awkward state/render duplication.
